description_long: This object is a brooch designed in the shape of a butterfly, featuring intricately sculpted wings with multiple cutouts and raised, glossy surfaces. The wings are symmetrical and display a pattern of rounded and elongated voids, giving the piece a delicate, airy appearance. The material appears to be a shiny, black enamel or resin, possibly set in a metal frame, which adds to its reflective and elegant look. The body of the butterfly is slender and understated, with fine details suggesting antennae extending from the head. The overall finish is highly polished, contributing to a sleek and sophisticated aesthetic. This brooch would be a striking accessory, suitable for pinning onto clothing or accessories in an urban setting.
description: A glossy black butterfly-shaped brooch with intricate cutouts and a highly polished finish, featuring delicate wing details and a slender body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full butterfly shape, symmetrical wings with cutouts, and central body detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wings and the layered, three-dimensional structure.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the thinness of the brooch and the spread of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the wing's profile and surface gloss.
